name: REGO PAYMENT ARCHITECTURES, INC.
business: REGO Payment Architectures, Inc. provides a family-focused mobile banking solution called Mazoola, an all-digital financial payments platform for minors under parental control, compliant with COPPA and GDPR. The company licenses its platform to financial institutions, telecom companies, and other partners via white-label and partnership agreements. It has not generated significant revenue and is still in development stage.

exposures.sentence: Our focus currently is monetizing the Mazoola Digital Wallet Platform in the Financial Technology (FinTech) industry and mainstream financial services industry through white label, licensing and partnership agreements.
Blockchain, a distributed ledger technology, is also having a substantial impact on global finance.
Artificial intelligence (AI) is projected to reduce bank operating costs by 22% by the year 2030.

The techniques used to attempt to obtain unauthorized or illegal access to systems and information (including customers personal data), disable or degrade service, exploit vulnerabilities, or sabotage systems are constantly evolving...

catalysts.event: Executed strategic partnership agreement with Computer Services, Inc. (CSI) to integrate white-label Family Wallet into CSI's digital banking platform.
catalysts.sentence: On June 13, 2024, we executed a strategic partnership agreement with Computer Services, Inc. (CSI).

catalysts.event: Announced collaboration with Jack Henry & Associates to offer family wallet to their network of approximately 7,500 financial institutions.
catalysts.sentence: On November 14, 2024, we announced collaboration with Jack Henry & Associates to offer our family wallet to their network of approximately 7,500 financial institutions.

catalysts.event: Launched first Family Wallet white-label solution for a $7 billion AUM bank with over 160,000 customers.
catalysts.sentence: Launched our first Family Wallet white-label solution for a $7 billion AUM bank with over 160,000 customers

catalysts.event: Advanced second Family Wallet white-label solution integration to Beta stage for a $6 billion AUM credit union with expected launch in Q1 2026.
catalysts.sentence: Advanced our second Family Wallet white-label solution integration to Beta stage for a $6 billion AUM credit union with expected launch in Q1 2026

tamClaims.claim: The global fintech market was valued at approximately $340 billion (USD) in 2024 and is expected to be approximately $395 billion (USD) for 2025, with a long-range forecast exceeding $1 trillion (USD) by 2032.
tamClaims.sentence: The global fintech market was valued at approximately $340 billion (USD) in 2024 and is expected to be approximately $395 billion (USD) for 2025, with a long-range forecast exceeding $1 trillion (USD) by 2032.

tamClaims.claim: The global digital payment market is expected to reach about $122 billion (USD) in 2025, with robust growth through the decade.
tamClaims.sentence: Recent data suggest the global digital payment market is expected to reach about $122 billion (USD) in 2025, with robust growth through the decade.

tamClaims.claim: In 2025 there were over 5 billion digital wallet users worldwide.
tamClaims.sentence: In 2025 there were over 5 billion digital wallet users worldwide.

tamClaims.claim: The global mobile payment market size was valued as high as $7 trillion in 2024 and is projected to grow to $28 trillion by 2032.
tamClaims.sentence: The global mobile payment market size was valued as high as $7 trillion in 2024 and is projected to grow to $28 trillion by 2032.

tamClaims.claim: The global P2P payment market was valued at $4.3 trillion in 2025 and is projected to grow to almost $13 trillion by 2032.
tamClaims.sentence: The global P2P payment market was valued at $4.3 trillion in 2025 and is projected to grow to almost $13 trillion by 2032.

tamClaims.claim: Gen Z has approximately $450 billion globally in purchasing power.
tamClaims.sentence: As of 2025, Gen Z has approximately $450 billion globally in purchasing power.
